testsuite.name: tests.BasketballReferenceTest
testsuite.system-out: Year dropdown not found: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//select[@name='year' or @id='year']"} (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.168) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.2', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [6d8dd47364fd5804968ff1e533568d0a, findElement {using=xpath, value=//select[@name='year' or @id='year']}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.168, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: /var/folders/fn/nqsj_3w124l...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:64129}, goog:processID: 67876, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:64129/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.168, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6d8dd47364fd5804968ff1e533568d0a
testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 148.0.7778.178 (resolved driver for Chrome 148) [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/mohamedhamed/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac-arm64/148.0.7778.178/chromedriver May 23, 2026 7:30:37 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 23, 2026 7:30:37 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.168. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
